subcodes.first_line: O ye faithful friends of the Abhá Beauty! With what tongue shall I praise you, sing your glorification and express my admiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران باوفای جمال ابهی بچه لسانی شما را بستایم و مدح و ثنا گویم و تحسین و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
